description: Testing animation behavior in response to various user interactions including hover, clicks, and navigation events.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check displaying of animation when hover mouse on each item of target item:
+ Button
+ Menu
+ Image
+ Advertisment
+ Background
+ Link
+ Special area (base on spec)
expected_result: Display animation correctly based on spec (highlight or change the cursor icon)

+ Background

+ Special area (base on spec)

Check animation when click / double click / mutlti click out of:
+ Button
+ Menu
+ Image
+ Advertisment
+ Background
+ Link
+ Special area (base on spec)
Zoom in/ zoom out Animation page

+ Animation-duration
+ Property animation-delay
+ Another property which user can customize
expected_result: Animation displayes and operates correctly base on edited value in CSS file

All function on website still working correctly
New image animation is good working

description: Testing complex animation scenarios including multiple panels, simultaneous animations, and page positioning.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check below case when Animation has some panels:
+ Check Order of panel
+ Animation between each panel
+ Animation when click on icon/number of page/ or directly on panel
expected_result:
+ Order panel base on spec
+ Automatically switches to the next panel this cycle is repeated from the first panel to the last panel and then back to the first panel.
+ The corresponding panel is displayed when click on icon/number of page/ or directly on panel+

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when page has many animation items:
+ Move mouse between animation items while they are running
expected_result: All of animation are working correctly as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check animation when page has some animation on the Top page and on the down page:
+ Move up/down page
expected_result: Animation on the Top/down still working correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when page has some animation run simultaneously
expected_result: All animation is run correctly at one time
